$comment: Registry of structures we've built in the world, with coordinates. Append new builds here. Coordinates are Minecraft block coords (x, y, z).

builds.name: Spawn Castle
features: 31x31 battlemented outer walls (top y73, merlons y74)
4 corner towers, 5x5, to y79 (roof) with battlements y80
central keep 11x11 to y77, with door/windows and interior lighting
west gatehouse: 3-wide opening at z111-113, faces spawn

builds.name: Castle Moat
builds.notes: 3-wide water ring just outside the walls; stone-lined basin with an outer lip so it doesn't leak. Continuous around all four sides.

builds.name: Drawbridge
builds.notes: Spans the west moat at the gate (walk z111-113). Oak-fence railings, lanterns on the posts, and chains rising up the gatehouse front. Stone path leads from spawn onto the bridge.

builds.name: Death Star
builds.status: exterior shell + iconic details (superlaser dish, equatorial trench, hull paneling)

superlaser_dish.notes: Concave bowl, ~48 across, iron/light-gray concentric rings, black core, sea-lantern focusing lens.

equatorial_trench.notes: Recessed channel around the whole sphere at the equator; gray-concrete back wall, iron rim shelves.

details.hull_paneling: 10 light-gray latitude seam rings (iron recoloured) for the paneled look

hangar.notes: REBUILT (ds_hangar.py): the maze that had capped the bay was cleared from x133..163, y120 up to the dome, restoring a tall domed bay (open to ~y155+). Clean gray-concrete deck at y118, flush floor light grid, two yellow/black landing pads (148,100 and 148,124), dome lights, and a glass-fronted control booth at the back-left (x134-139). A scaled-up Jaeger mech is parked at (150,119,112) facing the gate. Bulkhead (x132 + FACILITY door), the blast-door gate (x165) and its trigger plates (x162/x167) were left fully intact.

gate.type: bi-parting blast doors (iron), animated, no mods
gate.mechanism: vanilla datapack 'deathstar_gate' (functions dsgate:*), frame animation on a tick loop
gate.trigger: stone pressure plates inside (x162) and outside (x167) the bay; auto-opens on approach from either side, auto-closes ~5s after you leave (won't close while you're standing in it)
gate.status: WORKING (fixed 2026-06-20). The 1.21.11 server (datapack format 94.1) rejected the old pack.mcmeta (pack_format+supported_formats) — format >81 now REQUIRES min_format/max_format. Updated pack.mcmeta to {min_format:[4,0],max_format:[9999,0]}. NOTE: the special #minecraft:tick tag only re-attaches to the server loop on a full RESTART, not /reload — restart after editing datapacks. Run 'function dsgate:install' once if the dsgate scoreboard objective is ever missing.
gate.forcefield: passable blue particle shimmer (minecraft:dust, force mode) across the opening whenever the bay is open — fly through it like the magnetic field
gate.klaxon: 5-beep woo-wee note_block.bass alarm that sounds when the gate cycles open or closed
gate.source: minecraft/datapacks/deathstar_gate (deployed to world/datapacks on the mini)

facility_interior.separation: the y118 deck + a curved bulkhead at x132 separate the hangar (above) from the facility; main entry is an auto iron-door (signed 'FACILITY') at x132
facility_interior.elevator: central ladder shaft at (120,112) linking all decks; each deck has a foyer with an auto iron-door gate (stone pressure plates)
facility_interior.spiral_stair: stone-brick spiral staircase at (120,100), y104-143, around a lit central newel with iron-bar railings; links all decks (8 steps/revolution)
facility_interior.maze_status: FROZEN — the recursive-backtracker maze still fills each facility-deck donut, but the generator script is ABANDONED: every run did a full clear-pass that wiped the foyers/rooms/hangar. Do NOT regenerate it. All further edits are additive and confined to defined boxes.
facility_interior.layout: per-deck topology (exactly): ladder room --DoorA--> named facility room --DoorB--> maze. Each facility room is a fully enclosed box at x100..114 / z105..119 (interior x101..113, z106..118), so it's cleanly separated from the surrounding maze. DoorA (east wall, x114) opens onto a carved foyer (x115..119) leading to the ladder at x120; DoorB (west wall, x100) opens onto a short stub (x96..99) that breaks into the maze. Both are auto iron-doors (stone pressure plates).
facility_interior.spiral_landings: radius-4 landing rings at each deck level so you can step off the spiral onto the deck (treads at radius 3, untouched).
facility_interior.room_access: each named room is reached DIRECTLY from the ladder foyer (DoorA) and is never lost in the maze; DoorB is the only way onward into the maze. Built by minecraft/scripts/ds_rooms.py (additive, bounded).

decks.y104: Command Center (west) + living cluster off the ladder room: GAMING ROOM (east), BARRACKS (south), KITCHEN+CAFE (south-east). Same as y110, built via 'ds_living.py 104'.
decks.y110: Living quarters hub — off the ladder room: Living Room (west), GAMING ROOM (east: arcade/jukebox/note-blocks, screen wall, table, seats), BARRACKS (south: bunk rows + footlockers), KITCHEN+CAFE (south-east: counter w/ smoker/furnace/cauldron, bistro tables). Built additively by ds_living.py; the east corridor's backing column re-holds the elevator ladder (do not carve x121,z112).
decks.y118: Cafe + kitchen — counter with smoker/furnace/cauldron/barrels, bistro tables with chairs; same deck as the hangar bulkhead access
decks.y126: Restrooms — quartz/glazed-terracotta, stalls with doors + cauldron toilets, sink counter + glass mirrors
decks.y134: Conference Room — long blackstone boardroom table, chairs both sides + head chair, blue holo screen wall
decks.y142: Swimming Pool — recessed prismarine basin with water, dark-prismarine deck, pool ladder, quartz loungers, sea-lantern lighting

builds.notes: Giant hollow iron sphere, ~101 blocks across, 1-block hole-free shell. Floats west of spawn, clear of the castle. tp drops you inside the hollow interior.

entities.name: Mech (Jaeger)
entities.controls: right-click to pilot; WASD walk + mouse steer; sprint to charge; R fires the plasma cannon
entities.model: custom GeckoLib 5.4.5 humanoid Jaeger (legs/torso/pauldrons/cockpit head/arms) with idle+walk animations, JiJ-bundled; replaced the iron-golem placeholder. Geometry/texture are a first pass (refine in Blockbench).
entities.notes: Rideable IronGolem-based Jaeger from mech-mod, scaled to ~9-10 blocks via minecraft:scale (model + hitbox). HP 400, step height 3.0 (stomps over walls), speed 0.45, never despawns. Combat: sprint-charge (1.6x), CRUSH (damages+hurls entities it walks into while moving), and a server-authoritative PLASMA CANNON on the R key (beam along look, 14 dmg + ignite, no block damage, ~15-tick cooldown). Armored: immune to fall/fire/lava/drown/cactus/falling-block/in-wall, but takes combat damage. Iron-golem model is still the placeholder visual (custom GeckoLib model is the next step). Needs the mod on BOTH client and server. Spawned on demand via /mech.
